channel.title: Couponaut Test Deals
channel.description: Sample coupon feed for end-to-end testing of the Couponaut engine. Served by the app's own nginx, so it is never blocked by robots.txt.

item.title: Amazon: 30% off electronics with code TESTSAVE30
item.description: Limited time deal! Use coupon code TESTSAVE30 at checkout to get 30% off select electronics.

item.title: Nike: Extra 25% off sale items - code RUNFAST25
item.description: Save an extra 25% on already discounted sale items. Apply coupon RUNFAST25 at checkout.

item.title: Hostinger: 75% off web hosting - use code HOSTDEAL75
item.description: Get up to 75% off all web hosting plans. Use code HOSTDEAL75 to claim the discount.

item.title: NordVPN: 65% off 2-year plan with coupon NORDTEST65
item.description: Protect yourself online and save 65%. Coupon code NORDTEST65 applied at checkout.

item.title: Adidas: 40% off running shoes - code STRIDE40
item.description: Limited stock! 40% off select running shoes when you use coupon STRIDE40.

item.title: Free shipping on all orders this weekend - code SHIPFREE
item.description: Enjoy free shipping with no minimum spend. Use code SHIPFREE at checkout.

item.title: Flat $20 off your first order with code WELCOME20OFF
item.description: New customers get a flat $20 off the first purchase. Apply coupon WELCOME20OFF.
